name: WLF_LI_VIDEOS_F
description: Table to store of technical details of learning item of type videos.

columns.Name: VIDEO_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: LEARNING_ITEM_ID

columns.Name: CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: CONTENT_ID

columns.Name: VIDEO_MEDIA_STATUS
columns.Comments: VIDEO_MEDIA_STATUS

columns.Name: THUMBNAIL_EXTRACTION_STATUS
columns.Comments: THUMBNAIL_EXTRACTION_STATUS

columns.Name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
columns.Comments: ENCRYPTION_KEY

columns.Name: PROVIDER_ID
columns.Comments: Transcoding provider identifier.

columns.Name: FRAME_RATE
columns.Comments: Frame rate in fps of the video.

columns.Name: FRAME_WIDTH
columns.Comments: Frame width in pixels of the video.

columns.Name: FRAME_HEIGHT
columns.Comments: Frame height in pixels of the video.

columns.Name: VIDEO_CODEC
columns.Comments: Video codec of the video.

columns.Name: VIDEO_BITRATE
columns.Comments: Video bit-rate of the video.

columns.Name: VIDEO_TRANSCODING_QUAL
columns.Comments: Video transcoding quality selector

columns.Name: SCREEN_CAPTURE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the video mostly contains screen captures

columns.Name: AUDIO_CODEC
columns.Comments: Audio codec of the video.

columns.Name: AUDIO_BITRATE
columns.Comments: Audio bit-rate in kbps of the video.

columns.Name: AUDIO_CHANNELS
columns.Comments: Number of audio channels of the video.

columns.Name: AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE
columns.Comments: Audio sample rate in Hz of the video.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Original file name of video.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: STORAGE_LOCATION
columns.Comments: This column to store location of Storage server path where actual content (Video/Image) available

columns.Name: STORAGE_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: This column represents Storage server name where  actual content (Video/Image) is stored. Example Akamai, UCM etc

columns.Name: STREAMING_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: The stream packaging provider of the video.
